case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS. JACQUELINE CAPELLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,462.29 FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT CAPELLA, JACQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST, CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF SINAL MEMORIAL CHAPEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID SHINER, ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE CAPELLA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
